name: leafsync
description: Link a local folder to a live Overleaf project: mirror it locally, surface Overleaf reviewer comments and tracked changes as a local sidecar report (.overleaf/COMMENTS.md), and optionally keep the two in two-way sync. Drives a Playwright-controlled Chromium as the authenticated session host — no browser extension, no passwords. Needs Node + Playwright (one-time ./setup.sh); review Overleaf's Terms of Service before use.
